## Validation

- [ ] `make doctor`
- [ ] `make config`
- [ ] `make smoke`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Markdown link check
- [ ] Forbidden public wording scan

## Checklist

- [ ] One PR, one scope.
- [ ] README and manifest remain truthful.
- [ ] No private product data is included.
- [ ] New public assets are versioned when needed.
- [ ] No product implementation is added outside approved scope.
- [ ] Branch cleanup is approval-gated.
